plugins.prepareCmd: jq --arg v "${nextRelease.version}" '.version=$v' plugin/.claude-plugin/plugin.json > plugin/.claude-plugin/plugin.json.tmp && mv plugin/.claude-plugin/plugin.json.tmp plugin/.claude-plugin/plugin.json && jq --arg v "${nextRelease.version}" '.metadata.version=$v | .plugins[0].version=$v' .claude-plugin/marketplace.json > .claude-plugin/marketplace.json.tmp && mv .claude-plugin/marketplace.json.tmp .claude-plugin/marketplace.json
